title: Solo Leveling Inventory Anime Gui Pack
description: Solo Leveling Inventory Gui Pack For Java Edition
body:
Solo Leveling Inventory GUI Pack

A custom inventory GUI inspired by the system interface from Solo Leveling. This pack redesigns the Minecraft inventory with a clean dark theme and subtle glowing details to give a sleek anime-style look.

✨ Features:

Custom inventory design inspired by Solo Leveling
Dark UI with smooth, minimal layout
Clean and readable interface
Lightweight and simple (inventory only)

🎮 Compatibility:

Minecraft Java Edition
Works with most resource packs

📌 Notes:

Only changes the inventory GUI
No other menus are modified
